Off Calendar Jul-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Joyce E. Cliffor, Esq., appearing for defendant and moving party. Defendant's Motion to Mediate Case in Lieu of Non-Binding Judicial Arbitration is heard this day. Court ordered motion granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Jury Trial Date of 1/12/2003 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. A mediation OSC is ordered set on 10/22/2003 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court signed order. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference.
